rewritten_requirements: The system shall enforce a minimum cost of 20 pence for a call.
The system shall enforce a 2-minute time limit after inserting coins to dial a number.
The system shall check if the line is free or engaged before connecting the call.
The system shall allow the caller to hang up first.
The system shall deduct money as soon as the callee picks up the receiver and with each unit of time (UT) generated by the switchboard.
The system shall allow the caller to add more coins at any time.
The system shall return any unused change after hanging up.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: The system enforces a minimum cost of 20 pence for a call.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: 1. The minimum cost of a call is 20 pence.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: The system enforces a 2-minute time limit after inserting coins to dial a number.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: 2. After inserting the coins, the user has 2 minutes to dial a number (this time limit is enforced by the switchboard40).

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: The system checks if the line is free or engaged before connecting the call.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: 3. The line may be free or engaged.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: The system allows the caller to hang up first.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: 4. The caller may hang up first.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: The system deducts money as soon as the callee picks up the receiver and with each unit of time (UT) generated by the switchboard.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: 5. The pay phone uses up money as soon as the callee picks up the receiver and with each unit of time (UT) generated by the switchboard.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: The system allows the caller to add more coins at any time.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: 6. The caller can add more coins at any time.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: The system returns any unused change after hanging up.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: 7. After hanging up, any unused change is returned.
